Question.Label: Are witness statements to be included?

Javascript.HintText: Check box if signed witness statements are to be included in the documents?
Javascript.isEnabled: var val1 = Services.getValue(DirectionsTypeReqd.dataBinding); return( 'SPEC' != val1 && 'SD' != val1 && 'HW' == val1 ||PartiesAgreeCostNature.isEnabled() || PartiesAgressCostNature2.isEnabled()||IsPartiesToAgreeRepairs.isEnabled()) ;
